items.briefing:
With the FIFA World Cup approaching, scammers are ramping up efforts targeting fans, staff, and suppliers. Australians are being warned about fake ticketing websites, phishing emails, and fraudulent merchandise offers. Separately, research shows Australian football fans are readily connecting to fake Wi-Fi networks at sporting venues — a simple trick criminals use to steal passwords and personal information.

If you're attending matches or following the World Cup online, only use trusted, password-protected Wi-Fi and buy tickets or merchandise through official channels only. If an offer looks too good to be true, it almost certainly is.

featured.title: Microsoft, Australian Government sign MOU on cloud, cybersecurity and AI cooperation
featured.quote: Microsoft partnership signals Australia's strategic focus on sovereign cloud and cybersecurity capabilities.
